name: Gianduja Truffle Cake with Burnt Hazelnut Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the gianduja.
2. Combine crushed praline with vegetable oil and blend with melted gianduja.
3. Add crushed pirouette cookies to the mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a stainless steel or glass mold.
5. Dust the top generously with dark cocoa powder. Set aside to cool.
6. Melt the bittersweet chocolate separately and let it cool slightly.
7. Whip the heavy cream stiffly until peaks form, then fold it into the melted bittersweet chocolate to create a light mousse.
8. Spread the mousse evenly over the gianduja base.
9. Smooth the top and chill in the refrigerator.
10. To serve, dust the cake lightly with cocoa powder and slice into 1/2-1 inch pieces.
11. Arrange 2 to 3 pieces on a plate in a geometric fashion and serve with burnt hazelnut ice cream.
Yield: 1 large bande (approximately 3 1/2 inches by 22 inches).
